query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS guardian_alerts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  portfolio_run_id INT,
  alert_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  threat_level ENUM('low', 'medium', 'critical') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'low',
  title VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  triggered_workflow VARCHAR(100),
  recommended_action TEXT,
  is_acknowledged TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  acknowledged_at BIGINT
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS portfolio_runs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  run_type ENUM('ic_decision', 'guardian', 'crisis') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'running', 'complete', 'failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  input_summary TEXT,
  blackboard JSON,
  ic_decision VARCHAR(20),
  confidence_score INT,
  threat_level VARCHAR(20),
  total_tokens INT DEFAULT 0,
  duration_ms INT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  completed_at BIGINT
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS portfolio_steps (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  run_id INT NOT NULL,
  agent_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  agent_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'running', 'complete', 'failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  output JSON,
  tokens_used INT DEFAULT 0,
  duration_ms INT,
  error_message TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  completed_at BIGINT
);
